step5.interpretation: MODERATE agreement — review is reasonably independent, kappa=0.63 shows reviewer has own standards

step8.interpretation: NEAR-RANDOM agreement — BLIND review IS truly independent! Machine suggestions were essentially useless for active learning samples.

gold_rebuild.note: 2 rows removed as duplicates after text normalization

weak_label_eval.interpretation: Weak-labeler precision on depression is low (61%), but recall is high (98%). It catches nearly all depressed comments but produces many false positives.

baseline_gold_eval.interpretation: FIRST HONEST EVALUATION. TF-IDF+LogReg baseline: precision on depression only 24.5% (448 false positives), but recall 89%. The old 1.0 accuracy was completely fake — real F1 on depression is 0.38.
